---
title: "Henrietta Elizabeth Fursdon"
---

## Henrietta Elizabeth Fursdon

**Dates:** (1843-1928)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

She was a Gosling as ‘Irene’ and second daughter of the Rev. Edward Fursdon. [LG 1952 Fursdon]

### Letters

- Letter from July 29th [1869]
- Letter from Febry 3d [1866]
- Letter from Dec 18th [1863]
- Letter from Decr 5th [1863]
- Letter from March 12th 1863
- Letter from Decr 30th [1862]
- Letter from June 27th 1862
- Letter from March 26th 1862
- Letter from March 24th 1862 
- Letter from Decr 31st [1861]
- Letter from Decr 30th [1861]
- Letter from Novr 22nd [1861]
- Letter from Novr 19th 1861
- Letter from Decr 29th [1860s]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
